cards.front_text: Hvilket personbegreb ligger i trait and assessment psychology?
cards.back_html_sanitized:
Person: The person is treated as a measurable profile of relatively stable individual differences that can be compared across persons.
Personlighed/subjektivitet: Personality is described through trait dimensions, distributions of behavior, and assessment categories. Newer process views keep situations and state variation visible.

cards.front_text: Hvilken metode eller evidensform stoler trait and assessment psychology især på?
cards.back_html_sanitized: Questionnaires, observer reports, lexical work, factor analysis, Big Five/HEXACO models, situation-trait-outcome models, and longitudinal assessment.
cards.back_text: Questionnaires, observer reports, lexical work, factor analysis, Big Five/HEXACO models, situation-trait-outcome models, and longitudinal assessment.

cards.front_text: Hvad gør trait and assessment psychology synligt, og hvad risikerer teorien at skjule?
cards.back_html_sanitized:
Gør synligt:
  • Gives a precise vocabulary for describing and comparing individual differences.
  • Supports prediction, measurement, and falsifiable research designs.
  • Creates a useful baseline that later theories can critique or extend.
Risikerer at skjule:
  • Can reify categories and underplay lived meaning, crisis, culture, and power.
  • Often explains less than it describes.
  • Risks treating personality as too independent of language and social practice.

cards.front_text: Hvad gør psychoanalytic personality theory synligt, og hvad risikerer teorien at skjule?

  • Has contested empirical status and can be difficult to falsify.
  • Risks underplaying social practice if treated only as intrapsychic.

  • Gives strong language for freedom, responsibility, anxiety, meaning, and authenticity.

  • Can become individualistic and place heavy responsibility on the person.
  • May underplay social structure, culture, and material conditions.
  • Can be abstract when concrete therapeutic guidance is needed.

cards.front_text: Eksamenstrap i comparative theory analysis: hvorfor er dette for simpelt? Using the matrix as a replacement for readings.
cards.back_html_sanitized:
Korrigering: Undgå at gøre comparative theory analysis så flad.
Hold fast i: This cluster uses historical and comparative reflection to judge what each theory can and cannot explain about persons, selves, and subjectivity.
Eksamensvinkel: This row captures the core value of the older notes: exam-ready comparison across theories using stable orientation points.
Begreber der kan nuancere svaret:
  • essence versus context
  • determination
  • agency
  • historicity
  • theory comparison
